improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is a Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business professionals. Get instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon: the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and a dedicated workspace."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating what Gideon offers and who it serves. Open Graph tags ensure the homepage displays professionally when shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and Facebook—critical channels for reaching business professionals. Including the free trial mention creates immediate incentive to click.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace built for professionals. Try three searches free — no credit card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces the product by name and clearly defines what it does, building trust and clarity. The subheading highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) while emphasizing the low-friction free trial. 'No credit card required' removes a common conversion barrier and encourages visitors to engage before hitting the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue accessing unlimited AI-powered trade and business support. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, with flexible monthly or annual billing options—annual plans save you 30 percent. As a member, you'll unlock voice chat, an unlimited workspace, and professional-grade assistance whenever you need it.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in a freemium model—what happens when the trial ends. It transparently explains the paywall, reinforces the low entry price, highlights the annual savings incentive, and reminds prospects of the value they unlock by converting. This reduces uncertainty and supports conversion at the critical trial-to-paid moment.
